DP.335.0026:
Let’s have the contestants move
backstage!\f

your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
Match the theme and earn higher
scores!\f

your Pokémon with Accessories.\f
Match your dress-up choices to the
theme to score big points!\f

DP.335.0042:

Your fashion sense is on trial!

DP.335.0047:
You can see your Accessories on the
left side of the lower screen.\f
Touch an Accessory, drag it to
your Pokémon on the right, and\r
position it securely.\f
You can put on ten Accessories,
so you should check for the right\r
ones using the arrow buttons.\f
Change the background with the
square button at the center right.\f
OK? Let’s begin dressing up!
